title: Lian Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Lian, with a Z-Score of +4.03. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Lian has resulted in a high Score of 10.0/10, indicating an extreme anomaly. 
 The temperature has led to a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) of 13.1 GG, while the Humidity Level is at 65% and wind speed is 9.7 km/h. 
 The absence of Heating Degree Days (HDD) of 0.0 GG further emphasizes the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
